USUAL, a token unlike any other

The USUAL token empowers our community to govern the real-yield profits derived from the protocol's TVL and services. This innovative token:

  • Promotes infrastructure decentralization

  • Grants rewards with new $USUAL tokens

  • Rewards early adopters through a disinflationary issuance

  • Ensures fairness with non-dilutive features

  • Aligns fully with user interests, being tied to the protocol’s success

Imagine a world where the influence of financial titans like JP Morgan, Blackrock, Tether, and Circle is democratized, held collectively by all their users. Usual makes this revolutionary vision a reality.

Life is risky but Usual is transparent about all financial, technological and legal risks.

Usual's policy requires rigorous due diligence on our partners, prioritizing transparency, credibility, and adherence to strict risk management practices.

Our commitment to robust risk management, clear transparency, and stringent operational controls sets Usual apart.
